3124590.name: of the Devil - Episode 2
3124590.description:
HE'S COME TO COLLECT HIS DUE.

Unlock the second of five episodic murder mysteries with the Episode 2 DLC for "of the Devil."

Getting used to her new work-life balance after the events of Episode 1 has left Morgan with some growing pains, and that kind of stress isn't good for anyone's mental health.

Fortunately for her, the lower wards of the city are the perfect getaway; full of broken cameras and choking fog, with streets monitored by gangs and governed with synthetic muscle.

What more could a girl ask for?

Time to get back into the swing of things.

CLOSE RANKS.

The roots of organized crime have always run deep, but they've had to learn to grow their branches tall to survive in the late twenty-first century. Morgan will travel from the city's lowest depths to its highest peaks as she finds herself caught in the middle of a cold-gang-war spanning decades right as it starts to heat up.

PICK A CARD.

Up-end the prosecution's strategy by plucking the weakest thread from their logic and rake in the chips as you watch their argument crash down around them in all-new mental gambles.
